log: Pia Osei says nothing for a long while, which from Pia Osei counts as a whole conversation.
You wait a day in port. The dockworkers play cards. The meter runs.
◇ THE BROADCAST — every radio in the sector played the same four seconds. The band has holes in it now.
Pia Osei has taken to leaving the radio on at night. "So I'd notice," they say, "if it went quiet."
You wait a day in port. The dockworkers play cards. The meter runs.
